title: Tears of Steel
description: An elite open-source sci-fi short film featuring high-end cinematic visual effects, giant futuristic combat robots, and an intense dystopian setup.

title: Night of the Living Dead
description: The absolute legendary 1968 black-and-white cinematic masterpiece that completely revolutionized the horror genre and zombie lore forever.

title: Sintel
description: A breathtaking independent fantasy film following a fierce, lonely warrior named Sintel as she tracks down a captive baby dragon across a dangerous world.
